banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Morgan Ann Rivera, renewing a standard (non-commercial) New York driver license by mail using form MV-44, eligible on every scope gate (applying for a license, purpose is renewal, not a CDL applicant, no parent/guardian consent required). She has changed her last name since her last renewal (formerly Delgado), has moved within New York State, has a mailing address (a PO Box) different from her residence, has never held an out-of-state license, does not request the Veteran designation, opts into the $1 Life Pass It On donation, and enrolls in the Donate Life Registry. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible for standard driver license renewal via MV-44: applying for a license (not a permit or non-driver ID card), purpose is renewal, not a commercial driver license applicant, and does not require parent/guardian consent.

reasons.requirement: MV-44 is used to apply for a learner permit, a driver license, or a non-driver ID card. Only 'license' is in scope for this renewal schema; if the applicant is applying for a permit or non-driver ID card instead, the flow ends.
reasons.sourceRef: MV-44 p.1, 'APPLYING FOR' — License / Permit / ID card

reasons.requirement: MV-44's single-select purpose radio group. Only 'renew' is in scope for this schema; every other purpose ends the flow. Option order reconstructed from the PDF's left-to-right widget positions rather than a directly legible label-to-box mapping in the extracted text layer (see VERIFICATION.md).
reasons.sourceRef: MV-44 p.1, 'PURPOSE FOR APPLICATION' — New / Change Type / Replacement / Renew / Update Info / Transfer to New York / Conditional / Restricted

reasons.requirement: MV-44 page 2 carries a 'COMMERCIAL DRIVER LICENSE APPLICANTS ONLY' certification block distinct from the standard-license questions. CDL applications are out of scope for this schema (see the existing us/ca/dmv/commercial-drivers-license-application for that shape). If true, the flow ends.
reasons.sourceRef: MV-44 p.2, 'COMMERCIAL DRIVER LICENSE APPLICANTS ONLY'

reasons.requirement: MV-44 page 2 has a 'PARENT/GUARDIAN CONSENT' block for junior-license and under-16 non-driver-ID applicants. Out of scope for this adult-renewal schema. If true, the flow ends.
reasons.sourceRef: MV-44 p.2, 'CERTIFICATION' — 'Junior License' / 'Non-driver ID Card (under 16)' / 'PARENT/GUARDIAN CONSENT'

documents.label: Applicant certification
documents.sourceRef: MV-44 p.2 — 'CERTIFICATION'. Excludes MV-44's conditional certification clauses that apply only to a replacement, out-of-state transfer, conditional/restricted-use license, or Selective Service registration — none of which are in scope for this v1.0.0 standard-renewal schema.

documents.note: wantsDonateLifeRegistry is 'yes_sign_and_date'; signed and dated with donorConsentDate.

documents.label: Proof of honorable discharge from military service
documents.note: wantsVeteranDesignation is false; no veteran designation requested.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (us/ny/dmv/drivers-license-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the New York State Department of Motor Vehicles or any government system. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize renewal through NY DMV's own channel (mailing the completed MV-44 form, renewing in person at a DMV office, or the separate MyDMV online transaction) before this renewal is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
